label: New — Garden Walk, rebuilt
items: The walk now tours your whole garden the way you would: home first, then each location, each bed, then the plants in it — with anything unassigned gathered at the start and end.
Do a full day's gardening in one walk: complete, postpone or skip any task on any card — including harvest ripeness checks, partial picks and yield logging right in the walk.
Live soil readings and valve controls on every card: see moisture and temperature, open a valve on a timer or close it as you pass.
Log manual soil readings per bed (moisture + temperature) — they feed the Readings tab and AI Coach like any sensor reading.
Your watchlist walks with you: 'look out for' reminders at the gate and flagged-in-this-bed warnings as you reach each area.
Active plans appear where they matter, with next steps you can action mid-walk.
Notes and photos on any stop, skip whole sections and come back later — a same-day walk resumes where you left off.
Newer gardeners get gentle guidance as they go; experienced gardeners get compact, data-first cards.
